theme: The Fence — Workflow Engine Test Coverage

shots.title: Workflow gate guard dedicated tests
shots.notes: 15 tests for malformed JSON, invalid shapes, sprint-state transitions, skip tier, boundary conditions

shots.title: Sprint CLI integration tests — run/status/resume/skip

hazards.description: sprint-standard requires tickets variable and sprint_id pattern ^S\d+$ — switched to sprint-lightweight for CLI tests
loadWorkflow requires cwd as second arg — undefined caused TypeError in test helper

shots.notes: 14 tests covering run, status, resume, skip, error paths, legacy fallback, and help output

shots.title: Built-in workflow E2E — autonomous + lightweight
shots.notes: 3 new E2E tests driving all phases for both workflows plus variable defaults

shots.title: Engine edge cases + store failure conditions

hazards.description: complete() on failed execution throws 'status failed' not 'not found' — error message assumption
getExecutionBySprint filters out failed/completed — returns null, not stale state. By design for active-only queries.

shots.notes: 17 new tests for error recovery, state machine transitions, store integrity, persistence across reopen

findings: workflow-step-gate guard is registered in GUARD_DEFINITIONS but has no implementation function
getExecutionBySprint intentionally filters out completed/failed — active executions only
S67 race condition in recordStepResult was already fixed with SQLite transaction
